calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Orange County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Orange County Public Schools (OCPS) is Tuesday, August 11, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Orange County Public Schools in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Orange County Public Schools is Wednesday, May 26, 2027. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Orange County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Orange County Public Schools runs March 15–19, 2027 — one week before Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties (all break March 22–26). A teacher workday on March 12 extends the no-school stretch to 10 consecutive days through March 21.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Orange County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Orange County Public Schools runs December 21, 2026–January 1, 2027 (12 days). A teacher workday falls on January 4, so students return Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2026-2027 for Orange County Public Schools?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Orange County Public Schools runs November 23–27, 2026 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 26. School resumes Monday, November 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Earlier Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break falls a week before South Florida counties (Broward, Miami-Dade, Palm Beach all break Mar 22-26), making Orlando theme parks notably less crowded during OCPS break week.

yearNumbers.label: 10-Day Break Stretch
yearNumbers.detail: A teacher workday on Mar 12 (Friday before Spring Break) combines with the Mar 15-19 break to create a 10-consecutive-day no-school window through March 21.

calendarNotes: Orange County Public Schools (OCPS) begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 11, 2026, and the last day of school is May 26, 2027. Spring Break runs March 15–19, one week before Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties — Orlando theme parks are busy during OCPS break, but crowds typically peak the following week when South Florida schools are on spring break. A teacher workday on March 12 falls the Friday before Spring Break, extending the break to a 10-day stretch through March 21.
